floor_history.headline: fable-blitz deep recon: csmd4 IS marionation region-1's cheaper twin (no region-3) - the whole gap is the in-place-basin v1/a0 allocation-equation flip (pri(arg5) > pri(t0)); the wrap-weighting x in-p

Structural axis (decl order, s32/u32 narrow, statement re-assoc under arg5-after-t0) closed directly on csmd4: 4/4 masked-INERT at 2, head-order flip regresses to 7 - twin's structural closure confirm

Structural axis on csmd4 h5 base fully closed: 13 variants swept (var-splits, expression compression, decl-position, pointer-deref form) — 8 INERT at masked 2, 5 measured regressions (t0s-split=3, arg
Frontier top-3 cleared: do-while(0) wrap direction-invariant +2 insns (KILLS pri-lift lever), cnt-carrier regresses to masked 4, volatile fmt-carrier policy-rejected. h5 floor holds at 2.
s5 permuter: all 3 frontier hypotheses (block-scope multi-set carrier, named-dispatch reorder, nested do-while(0)) KILLED with measurements; h5 masked-2 floor holds

s7 forensics: h5 basin's LAUNCH sentinel on insn 111 originates at expmed.c::expand_mult case alg_shift line 2244 (hardcoded NULL_RTX target); frontier #1 (combine.c num_sets lever) KILLED — MIPS md h
s8 rederive: honest idx_1495=idx_1494+1 (from prologue asm) regresses +13 masked; m2c-derived shape is known-killed inline-all form
s9 rederive: 4 sibling-transplant probes from marionation_Exec twin all KILLED; s-reg webs disjoint despite shared surface residual

frontier.hypothesis: Frontier #3 (unchanged from ledger, still untested): duplicated-statement-into-arms lift on the t0 chain per [[duplicated-statement-into-arms]] (2026-07-01 sanction).
frontier.mechanism: flow.c reg_n_refs counts each duplicated statement as a distinct ref -> qty_compare pri = floor_log2(refs)*refs*size/span rises; jump2 find_cross_jump re-merges identical suffixes so emitted bytes are unchanged. If ref-count lift changes global-alloc's ranking without displacing the h5 basin's mult-expander LAUNCH on insn 111, its tiebreak vs insn 121 might resolve differently.
frontier.next_probe: Draft outer-scope `s32 t0_seed;` with `t0_seed = idx_1494[0];` duplicated into (a) the arm ending in goto do_timeout and (b) the fall-through arm just before do_timeout label; use `t0 = t0_seed;` inside the block. Sandbox --disable all. If masked <2, verify byte-neutrality via retire dry-run and inspect .jump2 dump. Needs FAKE annotation + duplicated-statement-into-arms cross-jump byte-neutrality check + layer-2 cheat-reviewer.

frontier.hypothesis: Frontier #2 variant (unchanged from ledger, still untested): express arg5 address via two independent runtime-live PLUS SETs that survive cse and combine.
frontier.mechanism: cse.c collapses `x = y; x = x + k` when y's set is dead-move; combine.c may algebraically fold two adds when addends simplify. Both addends must be runtime-live and their algebraic combination must not simplify to a form GCC's simplify_rtx recognizes. If arg5_addr genuinely receives two SETs surviving to flow, birthing_insn_p returns FALSE for the second one -> insn 121 loses LAUNCH -> insn 111 (still LAUNCH) beats it -> pair emits target-order.
frontier.next_probe: Draft: after `v0 <<= 2;`, do `s32 arg5_addr = v0 + t0;` (t0 is runtime-live at that point) then `arg5_addr = arg5_addr + ((s32)tbl_125c - t0);` -- algebraically = v0 + (s32)tbl_125c. Sandbox and inspect .cse2/.combine dumps.

frontier.hypothesis: decomp.me corpus scrape modality is untested this session (curl_cffi missing).
frontier.mechanism: The BB2 toolchain class (gcc2.7.2-psx/cdk, psyq3.5) has scratches on decomp.me that may include structural analogs to csmd4's target-asm shape. tools/decomp_me_scrape.py search --asm-file asm/funcs/cpu_side_move_dir_4.s would surface candidates ranked by asm-overlap.
frontier.next_probe: Operator installs curl_cffi in .venv (`source .venv/bin/activate && pip install curl_cffi`); a future rederive session can then run `python3 tools/decomp_me_scrape.py search --asm-file asm/funcs/cpu_side_move_dir_4.s` and manually inspect top hits.
